description: Personal notes with folders, trash, pin, tags, full-text search.

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: List the user's notes with optional folder / full-text / tag filters. Paginated up to 200 per page.

tools.name: get_note
tools.description: Retrieve the full content, tags and metadata of a single note by ID.

tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Full-text search across the user's notes. Paginated with has_more / next_offset.

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Create a new note with title and text content, optional folder + tags.

tools.name: update_note
tools.description: Update title, text content, tags or pin-state of an existing note.

tools.name: move_note
tools.description: Move a note to another folder, or to the root when folder_id is empty.

tools.name: delete_note
tools.description: Move a note to the trash (restorable).

tools.name: permanent_delete_note
tools.description: Permanently delete a note bypassing the trash. Cannot be undone.

tools.name: list_folders
tools.description: List every note folder owned by the user.

tools.name: resolve_folder
tools.description: Resolve a folder by name (case-insensitive) with match_quality.

tools.name: delete_folder
tools.description: Delete a folder — notes inside are moved to the root.

tools.name: list_trash
tools.description: List every note currently in the trash.

tools.name: restore_note
tools.description: Restore a note from the trash back to its previous folder.

tools.name: empty_trash
tools.description: Permanently delete every note in the trash. Cannot be undone.

tools.name: note_save
tools.description: Internal panel action: save one field of a note from the editor UI.

skeleton_sections.name: notes
skeleton_sections.description: Note statistics: total, pinned, trash count, recent titles.
